title: /shr
text: /shr Used in a client assignment file path to request a shared server from the Uniface Router. /shr Description By default, the Uniface Router directs requests to a shared server rather than an exclusive server, so this switch does not need to be specified in the [PATHS] section. Related Links /ex Requests an exclusive Uniface Server from the Uniface Router. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
